---
title: "Projects"
---

## Featured Projects

:::{.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### [USCIS Case Tracker](https://piranfar.github.io/USCIS-Tracker/)
Real-time immigration case status monitoring and analytics system. Track USCIS case progression with automated data collection, visualization dashboards, and historical trend analysis.

**Tech Stack**: Python, Data Visualization, Web Scraping
**Status**: Active
[View Project →](https://piranfar.github.io/USCIS-Tracker/)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### [Upcoming Project]
More projects coming soon...

**Status**: In Development
:::

:::

## Project Archive

Below is a collection of my work spanning clinical microbiology research, bioinformatics, and data science applications.

| Project | Category | Description |
|---------|----------|-------------|
| **USCIS Tracker** | Data Science | Automated USCIS case monitoring with real-time updates and analytics |
| **Molecular Dynamics Studies** | Bioinformatics | GROMACS simulations of drug-resistant pathogen interactions |
| **Clinical Diagnostics Pipeline** | Microbiology | Automated pathogen identification and reporting systems |

---

## Research & Publications

For detailed information about my academic work and publications, please visit the [Publications page](/publications.html).

## Let's Collaborate

Interested in discussing a project or exploring collaboration opportunities? Feel free to reach out via [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/vahhab-piranfar/) or check out my [GitHub profile](https://github.com/piranfar).
